mapper.select:
select i.id, i.inbound_no, i.arrival_id, a.arrival_no, a.order_id, po.order_no, i.warehouse_id, w.name warehouseName, i.inbound_number, i.status, i.operator_id, i.inbound_time, i.remark, i.create_time, i.update_time, i.deleted from inbound i left join arrival a on i.arrival_id = a.id left join purchase_order po on a.order_id = po.id left join warehouse w on i.warehouse_id = w.id
i.deleted = 0
and i.inbound_no like concat('%', #{q.inboundNo}, '%')
and a.arrival_no like concat('%', #{q.arrivalNo}, '%')
and po.order_no like concat('%', #{q.orderNo}, '%')
and w.name like concat('%', #{q.warehouseName}, '%')
and i.status = #{q.status}
and i.inbound_time between #{q.inboundTimeBegin} and #{q.inboundTimeEnd}
order by i.create_time desc, i.id desc

select i.id, i.inbound_no, i.arrival_id, a.arrival_no, a.order_id, po.order_no, i.warehouse_id, w.name warehouseName, i.inbound_number, i.status, i.operator_id, i.inbound_time, i.remark, i.create_time, i.update_time, i.deleted from inbound i left join arrival a on i.arrival_id = a.id left join purchase_order po on a.order_id = po.id left join warehouse w on i.warehouse_id = w.id where i.id = #{id} and i.deleted = 0
select id from inbound where id = #{id} and deleted = 0 for update
select count(1) from inbound where arrival_id = #{arrivalId} and deleted = 0
